ddls:
CREATE TABLE "screens" (
  "screen_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each screen */,
  "screen_name" TEXT /* Name of the screen */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the screen */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the screen is active */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the screen */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Minimum access level required to view the screen */,
  "cr_by" TEXT /* User ID of the creator of the screen */,
  "cr_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the screen was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of who last updated the screen */,
  "last_updated_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the screen was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("screen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Minimum access level required to assign the role */,
  "cr_by" TEXT /* User ID of the creator of the role */,
  "cr_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of who last updated the role */,
  "last_updated_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "lang_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each language */,
  "lang_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the language */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the language is active */,
  "default_language" INTEGER /* Indicates if the language is the default language */,
  "cr_by" TEXT /* User ID of the creator of the language */,
  "cr_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the language was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of who last updated the language */,
  "last_updated_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the language was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lang_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "screen_id" TEXT /* Reference to the screen the permission applies to */,
  "role_code" TEXT /* Reference to the role the permission applies to */,
  "lang_code" TEXT /* Reference to the language the permission applies to */,
  "is_permitted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is permitted to access the screen */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is active */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Minimum access level required to modify the permission */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "cr_by" TEXT /* User ID of the creator of the permission */,
  "cr_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of who last updated the permission */,
  "last_updated_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_screen_id FOREIGN KEY ("screen_id") REFERENCES screens ("screen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_lang_code FOREIGN KEY ("lang_code") REFERENCES languages ("lang_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_code FOREIGN KEY ("role_code") REFERENCES roles ("role_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_code" TEXT /* Role code of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Minimum access level required to view or modify the user */,
  "last_login_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp of the lockout time */,
  "cr_by" TEXT /* User ID of the creator of the user */,
  "cr_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of who last updated the user */,
  "last_updated_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_code FOREIGN KEY ("role_code") REFERENCES roles ("role_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the screen */,
  "screen_id" TEXT /* ID of the screen being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the screen was accessed */,
  "is_permitted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access was permitted */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Minimum access level required to view or modify the log entry */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the screen */,
  "cr_by" TEXT /* User ID of the creator of the log entry */,
  "cr_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of who last updated the log entry */,
  "last_updated_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_screen_id FOREIGN KEY ("screen_id") REFERENCES screens ("screen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log entry (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* Description of the log entry */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Minimum access level required to view or modify the log entry */,
  "log_source" TEXT /* Source of the log entry (e.g., user, system) */,
  "cr_by" TEXT /* User ID of the creator of the log entry */,
  "cr_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of who last updated the log entry */,
  "last_updated_dtimes" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
